remixd.connectionAlert1: Cannot connect to the Forge daemon. Please make sure forged is running in the background.
remixd.connectionAlert2: Connection to the Forge daemon terminated. Please make sure forged is still running in the background.
remixd.text1: Access your local file system from Forge using the @creditchain/forged npm package.
remixd.text4: The forged command without options uses the terminal's current directory as the shared directory. Use -u to bind it to https://forge.creditchain.org, https://alpha.forge.creditchain.org, https://beta.forge.creditchain.org, or your local Forge URL.
remixd.text6: For port details, see Forge daemon ports
remixd.text7: This feature is still in Alpha. We recommend to keep a backup of the shared folder.
remixd.text8: Before using, make sure your forged version is current:
